name: statement
description: the claim, one paragraph, honest wording incl. its own limits

name: established_at
description: when the underlying fact was first verified

name: last_verified
description: most recent re-verification (nightly loop / badge re-run updates this)

name: confidence
description: badge pass_rate where the claim is badge-derived; NULL otherwise (never invented)

name: conditions
description: conditions under which the claim holds (incl. badge decompositions)

name: counter_conditions
description: known conditions that weaken/contradict; contested pairs carry both sides

name: provenance_ids
description: job ids, badge rows, file anchors, chronology entries — every claim traces

name: status
description: established | contested | superseded (revision history is part of the knowledge)
